problem: How to achieve biological nitrogen fixation in non-legume crops to eliminate fertilizer?
hypothesis: If Rhizobium inoculation for nitrogen fixation is applied to to, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Life cycle assessment with 2 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
